title: Debt urgency per remaining lap
summary: Convert remaining stop or compound obligations into urgency ratios using estimated laps remaining.
rationale: Rule-state features become more predictive as the race approaches the finish. The run found late-race pressure versions more plausible than raw debt counts alone.
implementation_hint: For each remaining obligation proxy, add debt divided by estimated laps remaining plus a small constant, binary few-laps-left-with-debt flags, and interactions with current-tyre can-finish and next-stop can-finish features.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Estimated laps remaining can be unstable early in the race; clip denominators and add missing/invalid progress flags.
